# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.

Prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
    MyVpcCloudFormationStackSolutionTemplate: # Name of the Cloudformation stack resource (required)
        Type: AWS::CFN::Stack  # Specify type as 'AWS::CFN::Stack' for your template to be created in cloudformation. Required field by CFn resources  
        
    MyVPC10GbpsSubnetCIDRsPrivateOnly := ['x.x.x.xxx/24', ...] # Specify the Private SubNet Cidr here, required for Vpc and sub net creation  Required field by CFn resources  
    
    MyVPC10GbpsSubnetCIDRsPublicOnly := ['y.y.y.yyy/24', ...] # Specify the Public SubNet Cidr here, required for Vpc and sub net creation Required field by CFn resources  
    
    MyInternetGateway:  # Name of your Internet GateWay resource (required)
        Type : AWS::EC2::InternetGateway | 'AWS's Construct Library to create an internet gateway. required for VPC and subnet creation Required field by CFn resources  
        
    MyRouteTablePublic:  # Name of your Route Table Public resource (required)
        Type : AWS::EC2::RouteTable |  A constructor library that creates a route table in the specified region, with default settings. required for VPC and subnet creation Required field by CFn resources  
        
    MyVpcFlowLogs:  # Name of your CloudWatch Log Group resource (required)
        Type : AWS::Logs::LogGroup |  A constructor library that creates a log group in the specified region. required for VPC and subnet creation Required field by CFn resources  
        
    MyVpcSecurityGroupsPublic:  # Name of your Security Groups Public resource (required)
        Type : AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup |  A constructor library that creates a security group in the specified region. required for VPC and subnet creation Required field by CFn resources  
        
    MyVpcSubNetPublic:  # Name of your Sub Net public resource(s)(required) (Note : This is an array, you can have multiple items if needed.)
        Type : AWS::EC2::Subnet | 'AWS' Construct Library to create a subnets. required for VPC and security group creation Required field by CFN resources  
        
    MyVpcPublicRoute:  # Name of your Route resource (required)
       Type : AWS::EC2::Route |  A constructor library that creates an route in the specified region, with default settings..Required Fields By Cfn Resources.
